task: Advanced high-economic-value task: Safe-State Timing Review for Robotic Cell Stop Chain. Context: a principal investigator or technical lead needs an auditable analysis that can survive specialist review for safe-state timing review for robotic cell stop chain in the functional safety domain. Embedded packet: records: R1 component_ms=305 uncertainty_ms=17 approach_speed_mm_s=1977 distance_margin=-24; R2 component_ms=93 uncertainty_ms=29 approach_speed_mm_s=1527 distance_margin=-79; R3 component_ms=290 uncertainty_ms=29 approach_speed_mm_s=1666 distance_margin=119; R4 component_ms=244 uncertainty_ms=11 approach_speed_mm_s=1802 distance_margin=157; normalized_threshold_score=75.0; remediation_budget_usd=165000; options: O1 targets the component_ms driver and reduces normalized risk contribution by 12% cost=51150, O2 targets the uncertainty_ms driver and reduces normalized risk contribution by 18% cost=77550, O3 targets the distance_margin margin driver and improves normalized margin by 9% cost=89100; source_excerpt="senior owner expected to make release decisions from incomplete engineering evidence". Rules and constraints: margin = normalized_threshold_score - observed_risk_score; negative margin is fail, margin from 0 to 5% of the limit is warn, and larger positive margin is pass; remediation options may be combined only if total cost<=remediation_budget_usd; expert-review flag is required when any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift; all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: rebuild the decision logic, identify threshold crossings, test the sensitivity of the conclusion, and create the review-ready table. Deliver safe_stop_timing.xlsx + validation_plan.md with formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes where relevant, and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs, substitute outside data, or hide uncertainty; mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
